description_long: This object is a small, open-topped wooden wagon with a rectangular body and four black wheels. The sides and ends of the wagon are constructed from light-colored wood planks, with decorative cutouts along the upper edges of the side panels. The wagon features a long, red metal handle attached to the front axle, allowing it to be pulled. The wheels are solid and appear to be made of black plastic or rubber, with red metal supports connecting them to the body. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for carrying small items or children. The overall design is simple and functional, with a rustic, handcrafted appearance.
description: A small, open wooden wagon with four black wheels, red metal handle, and decorative side cutouts. The design is rustic and functional, ideal for carrying items or children.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the wagon, black wheels, and the red handle extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wagon, decorative cutouts on the side panels, and all four wheels with red supports.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle centered, showing the open back and the symmetry of the wagon's design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the wagon's length, side cutouts, and wheel configuration.
attribute_wire_basket_pattern: none; the main compartment is solid wood with no wire basket or mesh pattern.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is a straight, red-painted metal rod with a simple grip, designed for pulling. No ergonomic padding or branding is visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four medium-sized black wheels, two on each side, fixed to red metal supports; wheels are likely fixed and do not swivel, with no visible locking mechanism.
